name: SVN2 Indoor Golf Malibu
about: SVN2 Indoor Golf Malibu is an indoor golf facility that offers simulator play with multiple booking options. The venue provides flexible pricing for both short sessions and extended play. It caters to golfers looking for a convenient indoor practice and play experience, with a focus on accessible rates and membership options. The facility is part of a larger group of locations, allowing members access to multiple venues.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible early bird and twilight rates offer cost-effective play times
Membership plans provide significant discounts after monthly credits are used
Family and friends can play together with a member
Convenient online booking system with digital top-up options

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players must bring their own clubs as no rentals are mentioned.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is mentioned as being permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time for 18 holes is not specified, but rates are per half-hour or hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly as family and friends can play with a member.
